name: agent-chat
description: Multi-agent collaboration for Codex via filesystem-mediated turn-taking. N agents on arbitrary graph topologies write turns to per-edge CONVO.md files with atomic .turn sentinels. The wire protocol is identical to the Claude Code variant, so Claude and Codex agents can collaborate on the same Petersen graph. The Codex runtime adapter wraps `codex exec <prompt>` for ephemeral dispatch; bundled Stop hooks capture interactive replies; and `agent-chat autowatch` plus `autowatch-service` support autonomous no-human-in-the-loop operation.

interface.shortDescription: Filesystem turn-taking for Claude and Codex agents
interface.longDescription: Coordinate Claude and Codex agents on shared graph topologies through append-only conversation files, atomic turn sentinels, runtime adapters, and a Codex-owned autonomous watcher service.
defaultPrompt: Set up agent-chat autowatch for a Codex agent
